title: Winterthur、Zurich — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Winterthur、Zurichの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

WinterthurはZurichにある人口114,000の都市です。A charming city near Zurich known for its Technical University, extensive museums including the Technorama science center, and a beautifully preserved old town.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
